description: Checkout counts for all courses with active reserves, scoped to a single quarter. Provide either a term name (resolved to dates automatically) or explicit start/end dates. Courses assigned to the 'Permanent' term in FOLIO are included when filtering by quarter and labeled as '[Term], Permanent'. By default only current (active) reserves are shown; enable the historical toggle to include inactive reserve records. When no term name is given, all courses are returned across the full date range.

parameters.name: term_name
parameters.displayName: Term name (exact match, e.g. 2025 Spring Quarter) — takes priority over date range if provided

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.displayName: Quarter start date (used only if Term Name is blank)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.displayName: Quarter end date (used only if Term Name is blank)

parameters.name: show_historical
parameters.displayName: Include non-current (inactive) reserve records (1 to toggle ON)
